description: Create a daily GitHub Actions workflow named CentOS System CI that runs installation tests and valgrind tests. The workflow should trigger every day at 3 am and on pull requests to the master branch. Use an ubuntu-latest job in a centos:7 container, install dependencies, set up the environment, cache pyenv and third-party packages, build BioDynaMo, run valgrind tests, system tests, and notify Slack with the job status.
